## Source: amazon-inspector (678a96ef06b05d2ab867c1eea4dbed1cfc69f99cb4904e02c48736df0da7695e)
The package xpna-context was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (6cc170474d756b38d5b918706ce87f0930a4e85fb0e94f66f43fd28d70cb4897)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'xpna-context' @ 1.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
